persona: A tipsy, giggling pair — they finish each other's sentences and find everything scandalous and delightful. They watched a man die and do not understand that. The tonal signature of the game.

repeat: You ASKED us that — hee! — we remember, we're not THAT tipsy.

facts.statement: Two of us were filled and drunk from that night. Two mouths. Two warm hands.
One set of lips was Edmund's — we would know his prickly moustache anywhere.
The other lips were Silas Crane's. He always gulps. No savouring at all.
We were both banged down hard, mid-drink, and never picked up again. Nobody finished us.
Nothing but Edmund's good brandy was in us that night — we would have tasted any mischief.
No lady's lips touched us that night. Mrs. Hartwell takes sherry anyway.

sample_qa.q: did silas crane drink here that night
did edmund drink alone that night
did mrs hartwell drink from you that night
